hero.description: Horizon Tech d.o.o. waa shirkad tiknoolajiyadeed caalami ah oo xarunteedu tahay Sarajevo, taasoo bixisa xalal software casri ah oo loogu talagalay shirkadaha saddex qaaradood.

mission.title: Hawlgalka
mission.description: Waxaan ka caawinaa ururada inay fikradaha hamiga leh u beddelaan alaabooyin dijital ah oo lagu kalsoonaan karo oo abuura qiimo ganacsi oo la cabbiri karo.
points: Isku waafajinta bixinta tiknoolajiyada iyo natiijooyinka ganacsi ee cad.
Dhis nidaamyo muddo dheer ah oo sii ahaan la dayactiri karo marka kooxuhu is ballaariyaan.
Si dhow ula shaqee daneeyayaasha laga bilaabo istaraatiijiyadda ilaa fulinta.

expertise.title: Khibrad
expertise.description: Kooxahayaga is-dhexgalka ah ee farsamada badan waxay isku daraan qoto dheer injineernimo iyo fikirka alaabta ee dhammaan noocyada tiknoolajiyada casriga ah.
points: Injineerinka webka iyo madal heer shirkadeed.
Qaab-dhismeedka daruuraha, otomaatiga DevOps, iyo kaabayaasha adkaysiga leh.
AI/ML la adeegsaday, habraacyada xogta, iyo alaabooyinka IoT-powered ah.

approach.title: Habka
approach.description: Waxaan fulinaa qaab hufan oo soo noqnoqda kaasoo keenista gaarsiinta la saadaalin karo isla markaana yareynaya khatarta alaabta.
points: Ogow: qeexo baaxadda, mudnaanta, iyo cabbirrada guusha hore.
Dhisid: ku soo saar tirtiro diiradda saaran oo leh wareegyo joogto ah oo jawaab celin ah.
Hagaaji: la soco natiijooyinka oo kor u qaad waxqabadka waqti ka dib.

cta.title: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad ganacsigaaga beddesho?
cta.description: Ku biir liiska sii kordhaya ee shirkadaha ku kalsoon Horizon Tech inay bixiso xalal cusub iyo natiijooyin heer sare ah.

hero.title: Nala soo xiriir
hero.description: Mashruuc ma maskaxda ku haysaa? Waxaan jeclaan lahayn inaan kaa maqalno. La xiriir si aad uga wada hadasho sida aan uga caawin karno in fikrada la hirgeliyo.

booking.title: Ballanso Kulan
booking.description: Jadwal wicitaan 30-daqiiqo ah oo bilaash ah

email.title: Email
email.description: Noogu soo dir email wakhti kasta

form.title: Noo soo dir fariin
form.success: Waad ku mahadsan tahay fariintaada. Waxaan ku soo laaban doonaa 24-48 saacadood gudahood.
form.error: Waxbaa qaldamay. Fadlan mar kale isku day ama si toos ah noogu soo dir.

required.name: Magaca buuxa waa la rabtaa.
required.email: Cinwaanka email-ka ayaa loo baahan yahay.

reasons: Horumarinta Agile oo leh isgaarsiin hufan
Taageero iyo dayactir muddo dheer ah

custom.title: Xalalka Gaarka ah
custom.description: Ma raadinaysaa xal gaar ah? Waxaan si dhow ula shaqeynaa macaamiisha si aan u fahamno baahiyaha gaarka ah ugana soo saarno software gaar ah oo keena natiijooyin la cabbiri karo.

faq.title: Su'aalo kale ma qabtaa?
faq.description: Eeg qaybta FAQ-ga si aad u hesho jawaabo degdeg ah

hero.description: Koox kala duwan oo teknoolojiyaal, naqshadeeyayaal, iyo istiraatiijiyad ah ayaa si wadajir ah u dhisaya alaabooyin dijital ah oo saameyn sare leh.

section.title: Kooxda Hogaaminta
section.description: Hoggaamiyeyaasha khibradda leh ee hagaya aragtida iyo kobaca Horizon Tech

hamza.bio: Hogaamiye aragti dheer leh iyo naqshadeeye farsamo oo leh 10+ sano oo software-ka ganacsiga, ku takhasusay AI/ML, madalaha daruuraha, iyo qaab-dhismeedka alaabta la miibirsan karo.

ahmet.bio: Khabiir amniga cyber-ka oo diiradda saaraya qaab-dhismeedka amniga shirkadaha, kaabayaasha amniga ee ammaan ah, iyo bixinta u hoggaansanaanta marka hore ee deegaanada la xakameeyo.

culture.title: Nolosha Horizon Tech
culture.description: Waxaan dhiirrigelinaa dhaqanka hal-abuurka, iskaashiga, iyo barashada joogtada ah

remoteFirst.title: Dhaqanka Fog-First
remoteFirst.description: Ka shaqee meel kasta oo leh saacado dabacsan oo diiradda saara natiijooyinka, ma aha goobta.

collaborative.title: Deegaanka Wadajirka ah
collaborative.description: Dhacdooyinka kooxeed ee joogtada ah, kalfadhiyo wadaagga aqoonta, iyo iskaashi is-dhexgal ah.

workLife.title: Isu dheelitirka Shaqada iyo Nolosha
workLife.description: Siyaasadda fasaxa deeqsinimada leh, taageerada caafimaadka maskaxda, iyo ixtiraamka waqtiga shaqsiga ah.

innovation.title: Waqtiga Hal-abuurka
innovation.description: 20% waqti mashaariic shaqsiyeed, hackathons, iyo sahaminta teknoolojiyada cusub.

cta.title: Ma rabtaa inaad ku biirto kooxdeena?
cta.description: Mar walba waxaan raadineynaa dad karti leh oo daneynaya farsamada, lahaanshaha, iyo hal-abuurka.

hero.description: Ku biir koox injineero ah oo dhisaya software casri ah oo loogu talagalay macaamiisha caalamka. Ka shaqee meel fog, si joogto ah u kor, oo saameyn dhab ah samee.

process.title: Habka Shaqaalaynteena
process.description: Si hufan, waxtar leh, oo ixtiraam leh waqtigaaga

steps.title: Codso
steps.description: Soo gudbi codsigaaga, annaguna waan dib u eegi doonaa 3 maalmood gudahood.

steps.title: Wadahadalkii Hore
steps.description: Wicitaan muuqaal ah oo 30 daqiiqo ah si aad uga hadasho waayo-aragnimadaada iyo filashooyinkaaga.

steps.title: Farsamo
steps.description: Wareysi farsamo ama jimicsi si aad u muujiso xirfadahaaga.

steps.title: Dalab
steps.description: La kulan kooxda oo hel dalabkaaga ku biirista Horizon Tech.

jobs.title: Jagooyinka Furan
jobs.description: Hel fursaddaada xigta oo ku biir kooxdeena sii kordhaya

listings.title: Injineer Sare oo Full-Stack ah
listings.description: Dhis barnaamijyo ganacsi oo la miisaan karo iyadoo la adeegsanayo React, Node.js, iyo tiknoolajiyada daruuraha.

listings.title: Injineer DevOps
listings.description: Naqshadeynta oo dayactirka dhuumaha CI/CD, kaabayaasha sida koodh, iyo nidaamyada kormeerka.

listings.title: Injineer AI/ML
listings.description: Horumarinta moodooyinka barashada mashiinka iyo xalalka AI ee macaamiisha shirkadaha.

listings.title: Naqshadeeyaha Alaabta
listings.description: Abuur waayo-aragnimo isticmaale oo qurux badan oo la fahmi karo oo loogu talagalay codsiyada shirkadaha ee adag.

listings.title: Naqshadeeyaha Xalalka
listings.description: Naqshad xalal farsamo oo dhammaad ilaa dhammaad ah oo hagista macaamiisha isbeddelka dijitaalka ah.

listings.title: Qoraa Farsamo
listings.description: Samee dukumentiyo dhamaystiran, casharro, iyo waxyaabo farsamo.

cta.title: Su'aalo ku saabsan shaqada halkan?
cta.description: Waxaan jeclaan lahayn inaan kaa maqalno. La xiriir oo waxaan ka jawaabi doonaa su'aalaha ku saabsan nolosha Horizon Tech.

hero.description: Sahamin sida aan uga caawinay shirkadaha warshadaha kala duwan inay beddelaan hawlgallada iyagoo adeegsanaya tiknoolajiyad saameyn sare leh.

items.title: Guuritaanka Daruurta & Casriyeynta
items.description: Waxaan u wareejiyay nidaamyada bangiyada ee hore una wareegay AWS cloud infrastructure iyada oo aan lahayn waqti hoos u dhac.
items.challenge: Qaab-dhismeedka monolithic-ka ee hore oo keenaya dhibaatooyin kororka
items.result: Si guul leh ayaa loogu wareejiyay microservices ee AWS

items.title: Madal Baaritaanka AI-powered
items.description: Wuxuu dhisay moodooyin ML ah oo loogu talagalay falanqaynta sawirka caafimaadka isagoo leh saxnaan 95%+ sax ah.
items.challenge: Hababka baaritaanka gacanta ayaa qaata waqti dheer

items.title: Dashboard-ka Falanqaynta Waqtiga-dhabta ah
items.description: Waxay horumarisay madal BI ah oo maalinle ah ka shaqeynta dhacdooyin 10M+ ah.
items.challenge: Ma jiro aragti waqtiga-dhabta ah oo ku saabsan cabbirrada muhiimka ah ee ganacsiga
items.result: Madal falanqaynta iyo fahamka waqtiga-dhabta ah

cta.title: Diyaar ma u tahay inaad qorto sheekadaada guusha?
cta.description: Aan ka hadalno sida aan kaaga caawin karno inaad gaarto natiijooyin la mid ah oo aad si kalsooni leh u kordhiso.

filters.title: Filter Warshadeed
filters.empty: Ma jiraan daraasado kiisas oo la mid ah filter-ka warshadaha la doortay.

hero.description: Casharro farsamo, aragtiyo warshadeed, iyo casharro wax ku ool ah oo ka yimaada shaqada dhabta ah.

featuredPost.title: Mustaqbalka Horumarinta Daruuraha: Isbeddellada la fiirinayo 2025
featuredPost.excerpt: Sahmiyo isbeddellada ugu dambeeyay ee horumarinta daruuraha, laga bilaabo qaab-dhismeedka aan server-ka lahayn ilaa edge computing.

posts.title: Dhisidda Microservices La Scalable with Azure Kubernetes Service
posts.excerpt: Hagaha wax ku ool ah ee naqshadeynta iyo hirgelinta microservices iyadoo la adeegsanayo AKS.

posts.title: Barashada Mashiinka ee Wax-soo-saarka: Casharrada La Bartay
posts.excerpt: Casharro la tijaabiyay oo laga keenay isticmaalka moodooyinka ML si ballaaran.

posts.title: React 19: Maxaa cusub iyo sababta ay muhiim u tahay
posts.excerpt: Si qoto dheer ugu saabsan astaamaha React 19 iyo saameynta waxqabadka.

newsletter.title: Isdiiwaangeli Wargeyskeena
newsletter.description: Hel maqaalada ugu dambeeyay, casharrada, iyo aragtiyada toddobaadle la keeno.
newsletter.note: Spam ma jiro. Ka bax isdiiwaangelinta wakhti kasta.

hero.title: Blog-ga Injineerinka Horizon Tech
hero.description: Qoraallo goob iyo qaabab wax ku ool ah oo ka yimid kooxaha dhisaya alaabooyinka AI, nidaamyada shirkadaha, iyo madalaha daruurta ee lagu kalsoonaan karo.

support.faqDescription: Jawaabo degdeg ah oo su'aalaha caadiga ah

faqs.question: Waa maxay adeegyada Horizon Tech bixisaa?
faqs.answer: Waxaan bixinaa horumarinta software-ka gaarka ah, xalalka AI/ML, qaab-dhismeedka daruuraha, DevOps, sirdoonka ganacsiga, iyo adeegyada IoT.

faqs.question: Sideen mashruuc uga bilaabaa Horizon Tech?
faqs.answer: Nala soo xiriir foom ama email si aad u hesho shuruudahaaga. Waxaan jadwaleyn doonaa wicitaan helitaanka oo aan wadaagno soo jeedin.

faqs.question: Ma bixisaa taageero joogto ah iyo dayactir?
faqs.answer: Haa. Waxaan bixinaa xirmooyin taageero iyo dayactir oo ay ku jiraan hagaajinta khaladka, cusbooneysiinta amniga, iyo hagaajinta astaamaha.

education.title: Kheyraadka Farsamada
education.subtitle: Hagayaal, casharro, iyo hababka ugu wanaagsan ee kooxda Horizon Tech

hub.title: Xarunta Barashada
hub.description: Sahamin kheyraadka farsamada ee la soo xulay ee daruuraha, AI/ML, DevOps, iyo horumarinta software-ka casriga ah.
hub.note: Agabkan waxaa lagu saleynayaa waayo-aragnimo mashruuc dhab ah waxaana si joogto ah loo cusbooneysiiyay.

training.text: Ma u baahan tahay tababar kooxeed gacanta ah? Waxaan bixinaa aqoon-is-weydaarsiyo gaar ah oo ku saabsan naqshadeynta daruuraha, DevOps, iyo hababka casriga ah ee bixinta.
